# Preprocessing

-   Packages
    -   [{]{style="color: goldenrod"}[docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling){style="color: goldenrod"}[}]{style="color: goldenrod"} - Document intelligence built on LangChain.
        -   Perfect for legal, finance, and enterprise GenAI.
        -   Parse, summarize, and extract structured data from: PDFs, Contracts, Reports
    -   [{]{style="color: #990000"}[llmjson](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/llmjson/index.html){style="color: #990000"}[}]{style="color: #990000"} - Repairs malformed JSON strings, particularly those generated by Large Language Models. Handles missing quotes, trailing commas, unquoted keys, and other common JSON syntax errors
    -   [{]{style="color: goldenrod"}[markitdown](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown){style="color: goldenrod"}[}]{style="color: goldenrod"} - Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown
        -   PDF, PowerPoint, Word, Excel, Images (EXIF metadata and OCR), Audio (EXIF metadata and speech transcription), HTML
